scripts.prepare:daemon: npm --prefix ../../server/daemon run build && npm --prefix ../../server/ui run build && node scripts/prepare-daemon.mjs
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:daemon && npm run prepare:icon && electron-packager . Sniffer --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=dist --overwrite --icon=build/icon/sniffer.icns --extra-resource=build/daemon
